description_long: This is a medium-sized, spiral-bound sketchbook or notebook with a sturdy, matte-finished brown cover. The cover appears to be made of thick cardboard or chipboard, providing durability and a slightly textured surface. The spiral binding is metallic and runs along one edge, allowing the book to be easily opened flat or folded back on itself. The pages inside are likely plain or lightly textured, suitable for sketching or note-taking, and are visible as a white block along the book's edge. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible illustrations, text, or decorative elements on the cover. The book is compact and portable, ideal for personal use in urban environments such as parks, cafes, or public spaces.
description: A spiral-bound sketchbook or notebook with a matte brown cover and metallic binding, featuring a simple, unadorned design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the metallic spiral binding on the left and the thickness of the brown cover and white pages.
description_view_1: End view displaying the flat brown cover and the subtle profile of the spiral binding at the top edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the spiral binding on the right, highlighting the book's rectangular shape and layered construction.
description_view_3: Front view clearly showing the full length of the spiral binding and the plain, matte brown cover.
